title: Pretty PLZ
description: Nice pretty thingies, for nice pretty people.
body:
![Large version of logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f95a90e9c3207fdb97e54407c23315633adefc16.png)

# Pretty PLZ adds multiple small, pretty features that make your world... pretty.

**Greener grass, for this side of the fence!**
![A picture of a minecraft forest with much greener grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d30ec2d24bd52a46042baaa25614adb1ec24e2ba.jpeg)

**The twigs and rocks will knock your socks (off)!**
![An image of a twig, and a pile of rocks on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32e3f1d8215e934eefe2e95101d505bff7504b7e.jpeg)

**And you can stack the rocks too! That just... rocks...**
![A picture of rocks stacked from 1 on the left to 5 on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0033fe3a41317d5b8bde2f1dfb0637d9f9e4ef5e.jpeg)
